name: Control Plane Groups - Privileged
description: Groups that gate access to identity infrastructure. Classification follows the Clean Source principle: a group is Control Plane/Privileged if membership grants Control Plane/Privileged access. Examples: groups assigned to Global Administrator, Privileged Role Administrator, Conditional Access Administrator, or similar directory roles. Also: break-glass groups, PAW admin groups, and any group whose membership transitively reaches Control Plane access.

groups.notes: Members receive Global Administrator or Privileged Role Administrator access. Role-assignable group recommended.
Break-glass accounts group. Permanent active membership for emergency accounts only; all other members eligible.
